Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
293 
The sixth position of the provider number is as follows: 
E = Non-federal emergency hospital 
F = Federal emergency hospital 
COMMENT: 
Effective October 1, 2007, the OSCAR Provider Number has been renamed the CMS Certification 
Number (CCN). The name was changed to avoid confusion with the National Provider Identifier (NPI). 
The CCN will continue to play a critical
